---
title: "Alexandria"
subtitle: "A Classical Greek & Latin Reader for iOS"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

## Read the Classics, Anywhere

Alexandria is a free iOS app for reading ancient Greek and Latin texts with built-in morphological analysis. Tap any word to see its dictionary form, part of speech, and grammatical features — no internet required.

### Features

- **1,784 texts** from 133+ authors spanning Homer to Apuleius
- **Instant word lookup** — tap any word for parsing, lemma, and definition
- **Offline morphological analysis** — works without an internet connection
- **Dynamic Type support** — text scales with your system accessibility settings
- **Multiple editions** — compare different editions of the same work
- **Reading progress tracking** — pick up where you left off
- **Bookmarks and saved passages** — save and organize what matters
- **Vocabulary lists** — track words you're learning
- **iCloud sync** — reading progress syncs across devices
- **Dark mode** — comfortable reading in any light

### Who It's For

- Students of Classical Greek and Latin
- Scholars and researchers working with primary texts
- Anyone who wants to read the ancient world's literature in the original languages

### Privacy

Alexandria collects no personal data. All text analysis happens on-device. iCloud sync uses your Apple ID and is governed by [Apple's privacy policy](https://www.apple.com/privacy/). See the full [privacy policy](privacy.qmd) for details.

### Support

For bug reports and feature requests, visit the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/TylerKirby/alexandria/issues).

### Links

- [Privacy Policy](privacy.qmd)
- [App Store](#) *(coming soon)*
